info.name: 🏥 Healthcare Lab - Enterprise API Suite
info.description:
## 🌟 Premium REST API Collection

A comprehensive, production-ready Postman collection for the Healthcare Lab Test Booking System.

### 📋 Features
- ✅ **50+ API Endpoints** covering all functionalities
- ✅ **Auto-Authentication** with JWT token management
- ✅ **Environment Variables** for seamless testing
- ✅ **Test Scripts** for automatic validation
- ✅ **Pre-request Scripts** for dynamic data
- ✅ **Detailed Documentation** for each endpoint

### 🔧 Setup Instructions
1. Import this collection into Postman
2. Import the `Healthcare Local.postman_environment.json` environment
3. Select the "Healthcare Local" environment
4. Run requests in order (Auth → Catalog → Bookings → Reports)

### 👤 Maintained By
**AMANJEET KUMAR** (@amanjeet233)
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/amanjeet233
- GitHub: https://github.com/amanjeet233

### 📌 Version
**v2.0.0** - Last Updated: April 2024

### 🎯 Target Environment
- Local: http://localhost:8080
- Production: https://api.healthcarelab.com

item.name: 🔐 Auth & Identity
item.description: Authentication and user management endpoints. Includes registration, login, profile management, and role-based access.

item.name: User Registration
item.description:
Register a new user in the system. Supports all user roles: PATIENT, TECHNICIAN, MEDICAL_OFFICER, ADMIN.

**Required Fields:**
- name: Full name of the user
- email: Unique email address
- password: Minimum 8 characters
- phone: 10-digit phone number
- gender: MALE, FEMALE, or OTHER
- age: Age in years
- address: Residential address
- dateOfBirth: YYYY-MM-DD format
- role: PATIENT, TECHNICIAN, MEDICAL_OFFICER, or ADMIN

**Response:** Returns user ID, email, and role on success.

item.name: Patient Login
item.description:
Authenticate a user and receive JWT access token.

**Required Fields:**
- email: Registered email address
- password: User password

**Response:** Returns accessToken, refreshToken, userId, and user role.

**Auto-Sets:**
- patient_token: JWT access token for subsequent requests
- patient_id: User ID for profile operations

item.name: Technician Login
item.description:
Authenticate a technician user.

**Auto-Sets:**
- technician_token: JWT access token for technician operations

item.name: Doctor Login
item.description:
Authenticate a medical officer.

**Auto-Sets:**
- doctor_token: JWT access token for medical officer operations

item.name: Get Profile Info
item.description:
Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information.

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{patient_token}}

**Response:** Returns user profile including name, email, phone, address, and role.

item.name: Update Profile
item.description:
Update the authenticated user's profile information.

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{patient_token}}

**Body:** Fields to update (name, phone, address, etc.)

item.name: Logout
🧪 Catalog & Search
item.description: Lab test catalog management, search, filtering, and categorization endpoints.

item.name: Get Popular Tests
item.description:
Retrieve the most popular lab tests based on booking count and views.

**Response:** Returns list of popular tests with test_code, name, price, and category.

**Use Case:** Display trending tests on homepage.

item.name: Get All Tests (Paginated)
item.description:
Retrieve all lab tests with pagination support.

**Query Parameters:**
- page: Page number (default: 0)
- size: Items per page (default: 10)
- sort: Sort field (default: id)

**Response:** Paginated list of lab tests.

item.name: Advanced Filter & Search
item.description:
Advanced search with multiple filters.

**Query Parameters:**
- search: Search term (searches in test name, code)
- category: Filter by category (e.g., Blood Studies, Hormone)
- min_price: Minimum price filter
- max_price: Maximum price filter

**Response:** Filtered list of lab tests matching criteria.

item.name: Get Test by Slug (Test Code)
item.description:
Retrieve detailed information about a specific test using its slug/code.

**Path Parameter:**
- slug: Test slug (e.g., complete-blood-count-1)

**Response:** Full test details including parameters, reference ranges, and pricing.

item.name: Get Test by ID
item.description:
Retrieve test details by numeric ID.

**Path Parameter:**
- id: Test ID (numeric)

**Response:** Full test details.

item.name: Get Test Categories
item.description:
Retrieve all available test categories.

**Response:** List of categories with category ID and name.

item.name: 📅 Appointments & Bookings
item.description: Booking management, appointment scheduling, and tracking endpoints.

item.name: Create Appointment
item.description:
Create a new lab test booking.

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{patient_token}}

**Body Fields:**
- labTestId: ID of the test to book
- bookingDate: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format
- timeSlot: Time slot (e.g., 10:00 AM)
- collectionType: HOME or LAB
- discount: Discount percentage (0-100)
- address: Address for home collection
- pincode: PIN code for service area

**Response:** Booking confirmation with booking ID and payment details.

**Auto-Sets:**
- created_booking_id: ID of the created booking

item.name: Get My Bookings
item.description:
Retrieve all bookings for the authenticated user.

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{patient_token}}

**Response:** List of user's bookings with status, date, and test details.

item.name: Get Booking by ID
item.description:
Retrieve detailed information about a specific booking.

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{patient_token}}

**Path Parameter:**
- id: Booking ID

**Response:** Full booking details including test info, status, and payment status.

item.name: Track Booking Status
item.description:
Track the real-time status of a booking.

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{patient_token}}

**Path Parameter:**
- id: Booking ID

**Response:** Current status and timeline of the booking.

item.name: Cancel Booking
item.description:
Cancel a booking (if cancellable).

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{patient_token}}

**Path Parameter:**
- id: Booking ID

**Response:** Cancellation confirmation with refund details.

item.name: Reschedule Booking
item.description:
Reschedule an existing booking to a new date/time.

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{patient_token}}

**Body Fields:**
- bookingDate: New date in YYYY-MM-DD format
- timeSlot: New time slot

item.name: 📋 Diagnostic Reports
item.description: Report generation, result submission, and report viewing endpoints.

item.name: Submit Test Results (Technician)
item.description:
Submit test results for a booking (Technician only).

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{technician_token}}

**Body Fields:**
- bookingId: ID of the booking
- results: Array of test results
  - parameterId: Test parameter ID
  - resultValue: Test result value
  - status: NORMAL, ABNORMAL, or CRITICAL

**Response:** Confirmation of result submission.

item.name: Get Final Report
item.description:
Retrieve the final report for a booking.

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{patient_token}}

**Path Parameter:**
- id: Booking ID

**Response:** Complete report with test results, reference ranges, and interpretation.

item.name: Download Report PDF
item.description:
Download the report as PDF document.

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{patient_token}}

**Path Parameter:**
- id: Report ID

**Response:** PDF file download.

item.name: Verify Report (Doctor)
item.description:
Verify and approve a report (Medical Officer only).

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{doctor_token}}

**Body Fields:**
- reportId: ID of the report
- verified: true/false
- comments: Verification comments

item.name: Get User Report History
item.description:
Retrieve all reports for the authenticated user.

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{patient_token}}

**Response:** List of user's reports with dates and status.

item.name: 💳 Payments
item.description: Payment processing, refund management, and transaction history endpoints.

item.name: Initiate Payment
item.description:
Initiate payment for a booking.

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{patient_token}}

**Body Fields:**
- bookingId: ID of the booking
- paymentMethod: UPI, CARD, or NET_BANKING

**Response:** Payment link or payment gateway details.

item.name: Get Payment Status
item.description:
Check the status of a payment.

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{patient_token}}

**Path Parameter:**
- id: Payment ID

**Response:** Payment status (PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED, REFUNDED).

item.name: Request Refund
item.description:
Request a refund for a payment.

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{patient_token}}

**Body Fields:**
- paymentId: ID of the payment
- reason: Reason for refund

item.name: 👨‍⚕️ Admin & Technician
item.description: Admin dashboard, technician management, and administrative operations.

item.name: Get All Bookings (Admin)
item.description:
Retrieve all bookings in the system (Admin only).

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{admin_token}}

**Response:** List of all bookings with user and test details.

item.name: Get All Users (Admin)
item.description:
Retrieve all users in the system (Admin only).

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{admin_token}}

**Response:** List of all users with roles and status.

item.name: Get Dashboard Stats (Admin)
item.description:
Retrieve dashboard statistics (Admin only).

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{admin_token}}

**Response:** Statistics including total bookings, revenue, active users, etc.

item.name: Assign Technician (Admin)
item.description:
Assign a technician to a booking (Admin only).

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{admin_token}}

**Body Fields:**
- bookingId: ID of the booking
- technicianId: ID of the technician

item.name: Get Technician Assignments (Technician)
item.description:
Get all bookings assigned to the authenticated technician.

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{technician_token}}

**Response:** List of assigned bookings with status and location.

item.name: Update Location (Technician)
item.description:
Update technician's current location.

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{technician_token}}

**Body Fields:**
- latitude: Current latitude
- longitude: Current longitude
